attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
BK_COMPANY_CODE  ,             
BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,          
BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    ,          
BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,       
BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT   , 
BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT   ,       
BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
START_TV_DATETIME,             
START_SSP_DATE,                
END_TV_DATETIME ,              
END_SSP_DATE,                
BOOKINGS_PERCENT,              
ORDER_QUANTITY,                
UNIT_SALE_PRICE,               
UNIT_LIST_PRICE,               
UNIT_TRADE_IN_USD_AMOUNT,      
REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,             
ITEM_TYPE_CODE,                
CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,         
CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_CODE,      
SHIPPED_QUANTITY,              
SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE,           
ERP_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,    
SO_LINE_OPEN_FLAG,             
SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,           
CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE,  
PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
CUST_SHIPMENT_RECOMMIT_DATE,   
SHIP_SET_NUMBER,           
INVOICED_QUANTITY,             
SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE,
SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE,       
FACTORY_RECOMMIT_DATE,         
FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,          
PICK_RELEASE_DATE,             
PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,      
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,    
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,    
SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG,           
AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE,      
AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME,         
RU_SOL_RETURN_CONTEXT_CODE,    
RU_SOL_RETURN_REASON_CODE,     
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM, 
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,   
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,    
BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATE_TIME,        
BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATE_TIME ,       
SERVICE_CONTRACT_ROLE,      
MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,     
SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ,    
SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,   
EDW_CREATE_USER,  
SS_CODE, 
CANCELLED_FLAG,
ITEM_CATEGORY,
PRICING_DATETIME,
PRODUCT_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CREATE_DATETIME,
EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD,
RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
LINE_STATUS_CD,
COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD,
SOL_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
SOL_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME ,
DV_SOL_CANCELLED_QTY,
DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,
CASE WHEN REVENUE_TYPE_CODE IN('P','Q','M','p','q','m') THEN 'New'
WHEN  REVENUE_TYPE_CODE  IN('R','r')  THEN 'Renewal'
ELSE  'Others'
END    DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,      
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_REF_ID,
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_WEB_ORDER_ID,
BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD,  
ACTION_CODE,                   
DML_TYPE                      
FROM
(
SELECT 
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 						SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 							BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY							BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   						BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
SUOOLA.LINE_NUMBER	 							BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
SUOOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER   						BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE (SUOOLA.OPTION_NUMBER,0 )  			BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE( NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE ,'UNKNOWN')	BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,	 
SUOOLA.CREATION_DATE 							START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST (SUOOLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)				START_SSP_DATE,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))	END_TV_DATETIME,
'3500-01-01'									END_SSP_DATE  ,
COALESCE (SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE14,100)  				 BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
COALESCE(SUOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY,0)  			ORDER_QUANTITY ,
COALESCE(SUOOLA.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,0) 			UNIT_SALE_PRICE ,
COALESCE(SUOOLA.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0) 				UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
COALESCE(CAST (SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE11 AS DECIMAL(18,6) ),0)	UNIT_TRADE_IN_USD_AMOUNT ,
		CASE
			WHEN	CONTEXT IN ('FUTURES','ELDCHASSISID','ELDRLKREG','EMAILDLAONLY','ICDLVER','ICDLVERCCO','ICDLVERCSD') 
						THEN NULL
			ELSE	ATTRIBUTE4
		END										REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
ITEM_TYPE_CODE 									ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
NULL 											CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_CODE ,
COALESCE(SUOOLA.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,0) 			SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE, 
SUOOLA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID 						ERP_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
SUOOLA.OPEN_FLAG 								SO_LINE_OPEN_FLAG,
CAST(SUOOLA.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,
CAST(SUOOLA.REQUEST_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE,
CAST(SUOOLA.PROMISE_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE6  CUST_SHIPMENT_RECOMMIT_DATE ,
NULL 											SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
COALESCE(SUOOLA.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0)  			INVOICED_QUANTITY,
NULL 											SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE,
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE, 
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			FACTORY_RECOMMIT_DATE,
SUOOLA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE 					FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			PICK_RELEASE_DATE, 
NULL 											PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,
NULL 											CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,
		CASE
			WHEN	SUOOLA.OPTION_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N'
			ELSE	SUOOLA.OPTION_FLAG
		END										SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG,
NULL 											AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE, 
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME ,
SUOOLA.RETURN_CONTEXT 							RU_SOL_RETURN_CONTEXT_CODE,
SUOOLA.RETURN_REASON_CODE 						RU_SOL_RETURN_REASON_CODE,
SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE1  								RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE2								RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
 SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE3								RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER, 
SUOOLA.CREATION_DATE  							BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATE_TIME,
SUOOLA.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME  						BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATE_TIME,
		CASE
			WHEN	SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE3 IS NULL THEN 'N'
			ELSE	'Y'
		END										SERVICE_CONTRACT_ROLE,
		CASE 
        WHEN    SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG = 'Y' THEN
          (CASE WHEN RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY    = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY THEN 'MAJOR' ELSE 'MINOR' END)
        ELSE   'MAJOR'
        END  MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE					SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
SUOOLA.LINE_ID 									SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
USER 											EDW_CREATE_USER,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 						SS_CODE, 
COALESCE(SUOOLA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=') 							CANCELLED_FLAG,
SUOOLA.ATTRIBUTE13  							ITEM_CATEGORY ,
SUOOLA.PRICING_DATE  							PRICING_DATETIME,
NP.ITEM_KEY 									PRODUCT_KEY,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 							SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 		SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE
			WHEN	SUOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
			ELSE	COALESCE (SSOL_PARENT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -9999)
		END										RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  USER  										EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  							CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   							EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
SUOOLA.ACTION_CODE 								ACTION_CODE,
'=' 											DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(SUOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,'=')       LINE_STATUS_CD,
NULL  ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD,
 NULL  RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
'='  COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD,
COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
SUOOLA.CANCELLED_QUANTITY  AS DV_SOL_CANCELLED_QTY,
(CASE WHEN NIC.ITEM_CLASS_NAME='Option class' 
        THEN 'Y' 
        ELSE 'N' END) AS DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,  /*Added in rel10 */
COALESCE(SUOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,'-999') AS ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_REF_ID,
COALESCE(SUOOLA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,'UNKNOWN') AS ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_WEB_ORDER_ID,
COALESCE(MSIEB.C_EXT_ATTR2,'UNK') AS BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q4FY15, TO IDENTIFY RECORDS FROM SBP*/
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SUOOLA 
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS ENABLEMENT Q4FY15*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN ($$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_EGO_MTL_SY_ITEMS_EXT_B MSIEB
					INNER JOIN
						(SELECT ATTR_GROUP_ID,DESCRIPTIVE_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE
						FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT
						WHERE DESCRIPTIVE_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE='XXITM_ON_PREM_OFFER_EXT_ATTRS') EFDSC
					ON EFDSC.ATTR_GROUP_ID=MSIEB.ATTR_GROUP_ID
					AND MSIEB.ORGANIZATION_ID=1)
	ON SUOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=MSIEB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
/*END*/
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUOOLA.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
ON( SUOOLA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  			
/* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON	(SUOOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT) */
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
ON	(SUOOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(SUOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO') 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON	( SUOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )			
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_PARENT 
	ON	( SUOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = SSOL_PARENT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL_PARENT.SS_CODE )
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
				ON( NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUOOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOT
ON( SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SELECT
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
, EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
WHERE EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'
group by 1,2,3
) EFU_CR
ON
EFU_CR.USER_ID = SUOOLA.CREATED_BY
AND
EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'                 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SEL 
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
WHERE EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'
group by 1,2,3
) EFU_UPD
ON
EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SUOOLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
AND
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_CLASS NIC   /*Added for Rel10 for deriving dv_option_class_line_flg   */
  ON (NP.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE=NIC.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE)
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SUOOLA.LINE_ID
		ORDER	BY SUOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1
) A

SELECT 
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
BK_COMPANY_CODE  ,             
BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,          
BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    ,          
BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,       
BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT   , 
BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT   ,       
BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
START_TV_DATETIME,             
START_SSP_DATE,                
END_TV_DATETIME ,              
END_SSP_DATE,                
BOOKINGS_PERCENT,              
ORDER_QUANTITY,                
UNIT_SALE_PRICE,               
UNIT_LIST_PRICE,               
UNIT_TRADE_IN_USD_AMOUNT,      
REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,             
ITEM_TYPE_CODE,                
CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,         
CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_CODE,      
SHIPPED_QUANTITY,              
SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE,           
ERP_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,    
SO_LINE_OPEN_FLAG,             
SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,           
CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE,  
PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
CUST_SHIPMENT_RECOMMIT_DATE,   
SHIP_SET_NUMBER,           
INVOICED_QUANTITY,             
SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE,
SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE,       
FACTORY_RECOMMIT_DATE,         
FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,          
PICK_RELEASE_DATE,             
PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,      
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,    
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,    
SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG,           
AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE,      
AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME,         
RU_SOL_RETURN_CONTEXT_CODE,    
RU_SOL_RETURN_REASON_CODE,     
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM, 
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,   
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,    
BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATE_TIME,        
BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATE_TIME,       
SERVICE_CONTRACT_ROLE,      
MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,     
SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ,    
SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,   
EDW_CREATE_USER,  
SS_CODE, 
CANCELLED_FLAG,
ITEM_CATEGORY,
PRICING_DATETIME,
PRODUCT_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CREATE_DATETIME,
EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD,
RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
LINE_STATUS_CD,
COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD,
SOL_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
SOL_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME ,
DV_SOL_CANCELLED_QTY,
DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,
CASE WHEN REVENUE_TYPE_CODE  IN('P','Q','M','p','q','m') THEN 'New'
WHEN  REVENUE_TYPE_CODE  IN('R','r')  THEN 'Renewal'
ELSE  'Others'
END    DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,   
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_REF_ID,
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_WEB_ORDER_ID,  
BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD, 
ACTION_CODE,                   
DML_TYPE                      
FROM
(

SELECT 
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 						SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 							BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY							BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   						BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
SBOOLA.LINE_NUMBER	 							BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
SBOOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER   						BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE (SBOOLA.OPTION_NUMBER,0 )  			BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE( NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE ,'UNKNOWN')	BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,	 
SBOOLA.CREATION_DATE 							START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST (SBOOLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)				START_SSP_DATE,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))	END_TV_DATETIME,
'3500-01-01'									END_SSP_DATE  ,
COALESCE (SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE14,100)  				 BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
COALESCE(SBOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY,0)  			ORDER_QUANTITY ,
COALESCE(SBOOLA.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,0) 			UNIT_SALE_PRICE ,
COALESCE(SBOOLA.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0) 				UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
COALESCE(CAST (SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE11 AS DECIMAL(18,6) ),0)	UNIT_TRADE_IN_USD_AMOUNT ,
		CASE
			WHEN	CONTEXT IN ('FUTURES','ELDCHASSISID','ELDRLKREG','EMAILDLAONLY','ICDLVER','ICDLVERCCO','ICDLVERCSD') 
						THEN NULL
			ELSE	ATTRIBUTE4
		END										REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
ITEM_TYPE_CODE 									ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
NULL 											CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_CODE ,
COALESCE(SBOOLA.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,0) 			SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE, 
SBOOLA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID 						ERP_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
SBOOLA.OPEN_FLAG 								SO_LINE_OPEN_FLAG,
CAST(SBOOLA.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,
CAST(SBOOLA.REQUEST_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE,
CAST(SBOOLA.PROMISE_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE6  CUST_SHIPMENT_RECOMMIT_DATE ,
NULL 											SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
COALESCE(SBOOLA.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0)  			INVOICED_QUANTITY,
NULL 											SHIP_CONFIRM_RESULT_CODE,
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE, 
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			FACTORY_RECOMMIT_DATE,
SBOOLA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE 					FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			PICK_RELEASE_DATE, 
NULL 											PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,
NULL 											CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE,
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE,
		CASE
			WHEN	SBOOLA.OPTION_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N'
			ELSE	SBOOLA.OPTION_FLAG
		END										SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG,
NULL 											AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE, 
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME ,
SBOOLA.RETURN_CONTEXT 							RU_SOL_RETURN_CONTEXT_CODE,
SBOOLA.RETURN_REASON_CODE 						RU_SOL_RETURN_REASON_CODE,
SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE1  								RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE2								RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
 SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE3								RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER, 
SBOOLA.CREATION_DATE  							BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATE_TIME,
SBOOLA.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME  						BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATE_TIME,
		CASE
			WHEN	SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE3 IS NULL THEN 'N'
			ELSE	'Y'
		END										SERVICE_CONTRACT_ROLE,
		CASE 
        WHEN    SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG = 'Y' THEN
        (
		CASE 
		  WHEN RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY    = SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY THEN 'MAJOR' 
		  ELSE 'MINOR' END)
        ELSE   'MAJOR'
       END  MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE					SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
SBOOLA.LINE_ID 									SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
USER 											EDW_CREATE_USER,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 						SS_CODE, 
COALESCE(SBOOLA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=') 							CANCELLED_FLAG,
SBOOLA.ATTRIBUTE13  							ITEM_CATEGORY ,
SBOOLA.PRICING_DATE  							PRICING_DATETIME,
NP.ITEM_KEY 									PRODUCT_KEY,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 							SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 		SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE
			WHEN	SBOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
			ELSE	COALESCE (SSOL_PARENT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -9999)
		END										RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  USER  										EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  							CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   							EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
SBOOLA.ACTION_CODE 								ACTION_CODE,
'=' 											DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(SBOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,'=')       LINE_STATUS_CD,
NULL  ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD,
 NULL  RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
'='  COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD,
COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
SBOOLA.CANCELLED_QUANTITY  AS DV_SOL_CANCELLED_QTY,
(CASE WHEN NIC.ITEM_CLASS_NAME='Option class' 
        THEN 'Y' 
        ELSE 'N' END) AS DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG,  /*Added in REL10 */
COALESCE(SBOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,'-999') AS ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_REF_ID,
COALESCE(SBOOLA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,'UNKNOWN') AS ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_WEB_ORDER_ID,
COALESCE(MSIEB.C_EXT_ATTR2,'UNK') AS BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q4FY15, TO IDENTIFY RECORDS FROM SBP*/
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SBOOLA 
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS ENABLEMENT Q4FY15*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN ($$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_EGO_MTL_SY_ITEMS_EXT_B MSIEB
					INNER JOIN
						(SELECT ATTR_GROUP_ID,DESCRIPTIVE_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE
						FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT
						WHERE DESCRIPTIVE_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE='XXITM_ON_PREM_OFFER_EXT_ATTRS') EFDSC
					ON EFDSC.ATTR_GROUP_ID=MSIEB.ATTR_GROUP_ID
					AND MSIEB.ORGANIZATION_ID=1)
	ON SBOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=MSIEB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
/*END*/
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SBOOLA.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
ON( SBOOLA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  			
/* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON	(SBOOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT) */
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
ON	(SBOOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(SBOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO') 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON	( SBOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )			
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_PARENT 
	ON	( SBOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = SSOL_PARENT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL_PARENT.SS_CODE )
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
				ON( NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SBOOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOT
ON( SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SELECT
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
, EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
WHERE EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' 
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) EFU_CR
ON
EFU_CR.USER_ID = SBOOLA.CREATED_BY
AND
EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO'                 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SEL 
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
WHERE EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO'
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) EFU_UPD
ON
EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SBOOLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
AND
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_CLASS NIC   /*Added for Rel10 for deriving DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG   */
  ON (NP.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE=NIC.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE)
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SBOOLA.LINE_ID
		ORDER	BY SBOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1
)A
